items.title: Three Firewalls, Three Philosophies
items.description: When people think of a home firewall, many still imagine a device that simply allows or blocks traffic between a local network and the internet. However, modern solutions have evolved far beyond that role.

items.title: Tri vatrozida, tri filozofije
items.description: Kada se spomene kućni vatrozid, mnogi i dalje zamišljaju uređaj koji samo propušta ili blokira promet između lokalne mreže i interneta. Međutim, moderna rješenja odavno su prerasla tu ulogu.

items.title: Human being as a security risk
items.description: In cybersecurity, the focus is almost always on technology. Organizations invest significant resources into defensive systems, advanced firewalls, EDR platforms, threat detection systems, network segmentation, and multi factor authentication. Security assessments are performed, patches are regularly applied, and strict security policies are defined.
